headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://images.unsplash.com https://*.google.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com; frame-src https://www.google.com; connect-src 'self'; form-action 'self' https://formspree.io; upgrade-insecure-requests; block-all-mixed-content
